# Infinix Calculators
> A comprehensive directory of high-performance online calculators for construction, finance, tax, health, math, education, and logistics.

## Key Categories

### Construction & Materials
- [Topsoil Calculator](/calculators/topsoil): Estimate topsoil, fill dirt, and compost volume/weight.
- [Concrete Calculator](/calculators/concrete): Estimate concrete volume, weight, and bags needed.
- [Mulch Calculator](/calculators/mulch): Calculate mulch volume and bags for landscaping.
- [Drywall Calculator](/calculators/drywall): Calculate drywall sheets and joint compound.
- [Roof Calculator](/calculators/roof): Calculate roof pitch, area, and shingles.
- [Fence Cost Calculator](/calculators/fence-cost): Estimate fence building materials and costs.
- [Brick Calculator](/calculators/brick): Estimate bricks and mortar needed for walls.
- [Siding Calculator](/calculators/siding): Estimate siding panels for exterior walls.

### Financial & Payroll
- [Affirm Calculator](/calculators/affirm): Estimate monthly payments for Affirm loans.
- [Pro Rata Calculator](/calculators/pro-rata): Prorate rent, salaries, or other recurring costs.
- [Gross Up Calculator](/calculators/gross-up): Calculate gross wages from net pay.
- [Reverse Tax Calculator](/calculators/reverse-tax): Extract tax from total costs.
- [Georgia Payroll Calculator](/calculators/georgia-payroll): Estimate paycheck withholdings for Georgia.
- [Square Fee Calculator](/calculators/square-fee): Estimate merchant processing fees.

### Logistics & Unit Converters
- [CBM Calculator](/calculators/cbm): Calculate Cubic Meters for freight.

### Health & Fitness
- [BMI Calculator](/calculators/bmi): Calculate Body Mass Index.
- [Losertown Calorie Calculator](/calculators/losertown-calorie): Predict weight loss based on calorie intake.

## Blog & Guides
- [Landscaping & Calculation Guides](/blog): Read detailed articles and guides written by landscaping and calculation experts.

## General Information
- [About Us](/about): Learn more about Infinix Calculators.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): Review our data handling policies.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Understand our terms of use.
